summary: Complete frontend testing of Jonas Silva landing page completed successfully. All required features implemented and functioning correctly including dark theme with orange palette, animated gradient name, all 4 buttons with correct links, modalidades section with 5 modalities, footer quote, and all animations working.
passed_tests: Dark theme with orange luxury palette loads correctly (RGB: 10,7,5)
JONAS SILVA name appears with animated gradient effect
Subtitle 'Professor de aulas fitness e Zumba.' displays correctly
All 4 buttons present and clickable (WhatsApp, Zumba License, Cupom Mega Frios, Play Fit)
All button links point to correct URLs
Modalidades section displays with correct title 'MODALIDADES QUE ENSINO'
All 5 modalities found (Funcional, GAP, Bike, Step, Zumba Fitness)
Footer quote 'Dançar é vida. Movimento é liberdade.' displays correctly
Button border glow animations present on all 4 buttons
